Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}I'm not picking up the signal anymore. It looks like we've won.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}He was so strong... He even had the same power as Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5010 0 0}You can say that again. Good work out there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Hehe. I never doubted you for a second.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Still, though... I wonder who that was. He gave off such a strange reading.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Like it wasn't a Shadow, but it wasn't human either. It was more like... a mass of someone's thoughts or desires?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}The more I think about it, the less sense it makes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30067 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 4 25 25}If I had to guess... I'd say that person was likely the product of the Abyss of Time reflecting someone's wishes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30067 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 4 25 25}If I had to guess... I'd say that person was likely the product of the Abyss of Time reflecting someone's wishes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Really? But none of us know who that person is, so I don't think any of us would have wished to encounter them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}Maybe nobody wished to meet that specific person, but they could've wished for something like...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}"I want to fight someone really strong," for example. Something more vague.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}Maybe nobody wished to meet that specific person, but they could've wished for something like...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 50 0 0}"I want to fight someone really strong," for example. Something more vague.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}Oh, in that case, I guess your wish was granted! Maybe it's because you've been going into the Abyss so often.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Hmm... Maybe it wasn't exactly that, but something similar, like you wished to get stronger, or you wished for a challenge...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I think it could make sense for wishes like that to be granted like this too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}Yeah, that sounds like me, all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5094 0 0}That does certainly sound like something he would wish for...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}I guess it's also possible that the Abyss had nothing to do with it, and this was the doing of some other thing in some other place...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 50 0 0}I guess it's also possible that the Abyss had nothing to do with it, and this was the doing of some other thing in some other place...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}A place other than the Abyss...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30057 0 0}Maybe someone's—or multiple people's—inner thoughts were manifested somewhere else, and that place connected to the Abyss...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 4 25 25}And if the Abyss used that connection to grant a wish, then maybe both it and the other place are equally responsible...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30057 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 4 25 25}Maybe someone's—or multiple people's—inner thoughts were manifested somewhere else, and that place connected to the Abyss...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 4 25 25}And if the Abyss used that connection to grant a wish, then maybe both it and the other place are equally responsible...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}Um... This got too complicated. I'm lost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}Um... This got too complicated. I'm lost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}Me too. Maybe we're just not meant to understand what happened...[n]{f 1 1}
